text: Hello, is this emergency? Please help! Water has entered our house on University Road in Gulshan-e-Iqbal. My family is trapped on the roof and the water level is rising fast! Send a rescue boat please!

Oh my god, a building just collapsed here near KDA roundabout in North Nazimabad! I can hear people screaming from under the rubble. There is so much dust. We need an ambulance and rescue team right now!
Fire brigade? A commercial building in DHA Phase 5 has caught fire. It started on the ground floor but it's spreading up very quickly. I think some people might be inside.
We need medical help in Lyari. Two elderly men just fainted due to the extreme heatwave. They are unconscious and not waking up. Please send an ambulance, it's scorching hot here.
There is massive flash flooding in Sector G-10 right now. Cars are literally submerged in the water. We can't step out of the office. Please send rescue teams.
There was a loud explosion from the main transformer in Main Market Gulberg and now there's smoke. Complete power failure in the entire area, the wires are sparking. It's very dangerous.
The streets are heavily flooded here in Latifabad. Water is starting to seep into the houses. The drainage is completely blocked.
I'm calling from G-9 Markaz. There's water absolutely everywhere on the main road. I don't know if it's flooding from the rain or if a massive water main just burst, but the road is blocked.
